allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq '\\'''\\'' } | Select-Object Id,ProcessName')

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "stopped" } else { "no listener found" })
